error_signature: unoptflat signal unoptimizable feedback to clocked signal transposed state <ident>
raw_error_example:
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT: filter.sv:42: Signal unoptimizable: Feedback to clocked signal: 'filter.s[3]'
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT: filter.sv:43: Signal unoptimizable: Feedback to clocked signal: 'filter.s[2]'
root_cause: Transposed-form state register s[k] assigned inside always_comb, creating a combinational feedback loop. The transposed structure requires s[k] to be a clocked (always_ff) register, not combinational.
fix_rule: Move all s[k] updates into always_ff @(posedge clk). The tail element s[TAPS-1] gets data_in*coeff[TAPS-1]; all others get s[i] <= s[i+1] + data_in*coeff[i]. Never put s[k] assignments in always_comb.
